name: Automated Video Generator
description: Transform text scripts into professional videos with AI voiceovers, stock footage, and Remotion rendering. Advanced features include direct filesystem access, environment management, and whitelisted command execution.
author: Premkumar M (@itsPremkumar)

tools.name: generate_video
tools.description: Generate a professional video from a text script.

tools.name: get_video_status
tools.description: Check the status of a video generation job.

tools.name: list_jobs
tools.description: List all recent video generation jobs.

tools.name: write_input_script
tools.description: Save a video script to the input directory.

tools.name: read_input_script
tools.description: Read available scripts from the input directory.

tools.name: delete_input_script
tools.description: Remove a script from the input directory.

tools.name: validate_input_script
tools.description: Check if a script format is valid.

tools.name: read_output_file
tools.description: Read details or scene data from a completed video.

tools.name: delete_output
tools.description: Delete a generated video and its assets.

tools.name: upload_asset
tools.description: Upload media assets for use in videos.
